description: Dark blue dress, has a cutaway collar, concealed full buttoned placket leading to a slight slit in centre front at the hemline, sleeveless, patch pockets with a single box pleat and buttoned flap closure in the front, elasticated at the waist on the side and back, patch pockets with single box pleat and buttoned flap closure below the waist and back yoke Comes with a belt which has a tang clasp
